name: justai
description: Marketer-facing plugin for campaign planning, deployment, stored test authoring, content review, and run analysis through the JustAI Platform.

interface.shortDescription: Campaign planning, deployment, and stored test workflows.
interface.longDescription: Helps marketers research audiences, design ref-first campaign sequences, deploy scripts with companion stored tests, review content quality, analyze run history, and manage campaign lifecycle on the JustAI Platform.
defaultPrompt: Create a win-back campaign for dormant silver users, deploy it as a draft script, and test it for one representative user.
Update my onboarding campaign and refresh its stored unit tests in the same change before you run them.
Design a multi-touch onboarding sequence with email and push for new signups, then show which steps fit the current runtime.
Analyze my silver-tier audience and recommend the best campaign approach.
Review the copy quality of my active campaign scripts before I activate them.
Show me a performance report on the last 10 runs of my upsell campaign.
Build a competitive brief against [competitor] to inform our next campaign messaging.
